diagrams.title: Cache Memory Organization
diagrams.description: Shows direct mapped cache structure with address breakdown
diagrams.purpose: Understand how CPU address is used to access cache

diagrams.description: Complete flow from virtual address to physical address
diagrams.purpose: Understand address translation process in MMU

diagrams.description: Decision tree for cache access operation
diagrams.purpose: Visualize cache access timing and actions

diagrams.title: Memory Hierarchy Pyramid
